creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
The 'livefs' CD does run the installer (sysinstall) as a front-end, but 
instead of the files needed to install a system, it has a 'live' filesystem 
which can be accessed via the FixIt menu. That is, once you have a FixIt shell 
running you can run all the base system FreeBSD utilities from the CD.

-- 
Bruce Cran
